title: Memory-like innate response to booster vaccination with MF-59 adjuvanted influenza vaccine in children.
ehr_evidence: None mentioned; the study uses transcriptional, cellular, and antibody responses from blood samples.
summary: A systems-level analysis of immune responses to the trivalent inactivated influenza vaccine adjuvanted with MF-59 in children (15–24 months old) and young, healthy adults.
key_findings: Primary vaccination induced a persistent transcriptional signature of innate immunity.
population: children (15–24 months old) and young, healthy adults
limitations: Not specified in the provided text
